# safeer.dev / Hermes Workspace — Agent Doc Map

This file maps the important docs for agents. Start here, then follow `RESOLVER.md`.

## Operating rules

- `RESOLVER.md` — task routing and file destination rules
- `AGENTS.md` — project-specific agent guide
- `docs/00-admin/START-HERE.md` — short onboarding path
- `docs/00-admin/ANTI-PATTERNS.md` — things to avoid
- `docs/00-admin/HERMES-SKILL-INVENTORY.md` — active/candidate skills and workflows

## Portfolio strategy

- `docs/README.md` — portfolio docs index
- `docs/AUDIT.md` — audit findings and copy direction
- `docs/RESEARCH-QUEUE.md` — claims/topics needing verification
- `docs/01-strategy/channel-action-plans.md` — acquisition channel strategy
- `docs/03-offers/client-onboarding-playbook.md` — onboarding and offer material

## Outreach and proof

- `docs/04-outreach/` — outreach templates and scripts
- `docs/05-linkedin-presence/` — LinkedIn/profile/proof assets
- `docs/06-progress/tracker.md` — progress tracking
- `docs/07-playbooks/` — repeatable execution workflows

## Website code

- `src/app/page.tsx` — homepage
- `src/components/` — UI sections/components
- `src/app/api/contact/` — contact route
- `src/app/private/pricing/` — private pricing route
- `package.json` — scripts/dependencies
- `next.config.ts` — Next config

## Hermes reports

- `/home/saf08/sync/G5 Vault/Gem/3. Hermes/Reports/2026-04-26 - Feature Mining from External Hermes Repos.md` — repo feature audit and adoption plan

## Public positioning reminder

Use generic positioning on the main site:

- Automation & Web Development
- AI workflow architecture
- internal tools and operational systems

Avoid making the main public site explicitly Shopify/n8n-focused unless requested.
